# Vendored SARIF 2.1.0 schema

`sarif-schema-2.1.0.json` is the official OASIS SARIF 2.1.0 Errata 01
OASIS Standard JSON Schema (draft 4), retrieved on 2026-07-18 from:

<https://docs.oasis-open.org/sarif/sarif/v2.1.0/errata01/os/schemas/sarif-schema-2.1.0.json>

The fixture is intentionally committed so report validation is deterministic and
offline. Its required SHA-256 digest is:

```text
c3b4bb2d6093897483348925aaa73af03b3e3f4bd4ca38cef26dcb4212a2682e
```

Do not replace the fixture or update this checksum without verifying the exact
OASIS revision and reviewing the resulting schema change.
